news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd. will be unveiling its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after the U.S. financial markets shut down on May 6, 2025. The organization, listed on NASDAQ as BWMN, has scheduled a webcast for discussing the results on May 7, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will be hosted by Gary Bowman, the Chairman and CEO, along with Bruce Labovitz, the Chief Financial Officer. To participate in the live webcast, individuals can visit the Bowman Investments platform.
news.headline: Bowman to release Q1 2025 financials on May 6, 2025 after market close; webcast on May 7 at 9:00 am ET. CEO and CFO to host.

news.summary: A recent report on the Middle Eastern Power Rental Market, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, predicts significant growth in the market. The market size is expected to increase from $2 billion in 2024 to over $4 billion by 2031. The construction sector is the largest end user, holding more than 25% of the market share in 2024, followed by the oil & gas and utility sectors.
news.headline: Middle Eastern power rental market set to reach $4 billion by 2031; construction segment leads with 25% market share.

news.summary: In New York, Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR; BETRW), also known as Better.com, a prominent AI home finance company, disclosed a significant development. The company, which has facilitated mortgages exceeding $100 billion through its Tinman™ AI platform, confirmed a restructuring of its convertible notes with the lender. This restructuring involved the retirement of about $530 million in debt. In turn, this was done by providing a one-time cash payment of $110 million and issuing $155 million in new senior notes.
news.headline: Better Home & Finance Holding Co. retires $530 million convertible notes, adding $265 million pre-tax equity value for AI mortgage expansion.

news.summary: AstroNova, Inc., a leading global provider of data visualization technologies, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on January 31, 2025. The fiscal report included the acquisition of MTEX NS on May 6, 2024. Greg Woods, the President and CEO of AstroNova, described fiscal year 2025 as demanding due to the integration of MTEX and the repercussions of the Boeing strike. AstroNova's stock symbol on Nasdaq is ALOT.
news.headline: AstroNova (Nasdaq: ALOT) reports fiscal 2025 Q4 & full-year results; acquired MTEX NS in May 2024. CEO aims to drive improved earnings through restructuring, operational realignment, and product simplification.

news.summary: Montreal-based Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) shared an update on its expansion plans in West Africa and Latin America. The company is progressing well towards its 2025 goals, including the development of a 50-tpd pilot plant in Senegal. Dynacor is on track to produce 500,000 AuEq ounces by 2030. Key milestones include awarding all tenders and contracts for the Senegal project. The company is optimistic about achieving its objectives within the specified timeline. No specific figures were provided in the released statement.
news.headline: Dynacor progressing with expansion plan in West Africa and Latin America. On track for producing 500,000 AuEq ounces by 2030.

news.summary: Vancouver, Canada - On April 14, 2025, Montage Gold Corp. confirmed exercising its participation right to uphold its equity stake in Sanu Gold Corporation after Sanu's non-brokered private placement declared on March 25, 2025. Montage Gold Corp. trades on the TSXV as MAU and on the OTCQX as MAUTF, while Sanu Gold Corporation is listed on the CSE as SANU and on the OTCQB as SNGCF. The move signifies Montage's commitment to maintaining its position in Sanu, highlighting the confidence in the companies' collaborative prospects.
news.headline: Montage Gold exercises participation rights to keep equity in Sanu Gold Corp after a non-brokered private placement on March 25, 2025.Character count: 136

news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, as of April 14, 2025, Android users have the option to wirelessly supervise and control their Battle Born® smart battery systems via the recently launched Battle Born Mobile App, now accessible on the Google Play Store. This app, created by Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. (Nasdaq: DFLI), a renowned player in the energy storage and battery sector responsible for Battle Born Batteries®, is designed to operate solely with batteries featuring Dragonfly IntelLigence® technology. It provides users with real-time information, system notifications, historical performance analysis, and diagnostic tools to assist in enhancing their power setups.
news.headline: Android users can now use Battle Born Mobile App to monitor Battle Born smart battery systems wirelessly. App available on Google Play Store. Developed by Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp., the app works with batteries equipped with Dragonfly IntelLigence. It delivers real-time data and historical performance insights to optimize power systems.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on April 14, 2025, American Tungsten Corp. (CSE:TUNG) (OTCQB:DEMRF) (FSE:RK9) appointed Ali Haji as the new Chief Executive Officer. Murray Nye will transition to the role of President to offer strategic direction and guidance to the technical team, supporting the Company's progress in its flagship tungsten project, the IMA Mine. This move aims to further American Tungsten's long-term vision, marking a shift in leadership responsibilities within the Company.
news.headline: American Tungsten Corp. appoints Ali Haji as CEO, Murray Nye as President to lead flagship tungsten project.

news.summary: The latest reports indicate that a total of 2,500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of the flu virus in the city. Among those affected, 400 cases have been confirmed as severe, requiring immediate medical attention. Health authorities are currently working to contain the spread of the virus and have advised the public to take necessary precautions, such as frequent hand washing and avoiding crowded places. The local hospitals have been overwhelmed with the increasing number of patients seeking treatment for flu-like symptoms. Residents are urged to seek medical help if they experience any signs of the flu and to stay home if feeling unwell to prevent further transmission of the virus.
news.headline: Relmada Therapeutics will present data on NDV-01 at AUA2025 conference.

news.summary: In an effort to strengthen its presence in music copyright identification, Vobile, a prominent company specializing in digital content protection and transaction services, has recently finalized the acquisition of Pex. news.summary: Leading up to the sharp collapse of the OM token on April 13, blockchain analysts have identified large-scale token transfers by major Mantra investors, raising concerns about insider activity and project stability. Laser Digital, a strategic investor, reportedly cashed out large portions of OM tokens before the collapse, with at least two wallets linked to Laser Digital moving a combined 43.6 million OM tokens worth approximately $227 million to exchanges. Another wallet linked to Laser Digital moved about 6.5 million OM tokens ($41.6 million) to OKX and 2.2 million OM tokens ($13 million) to Binance. The firm denied involvement in the volatility, stating the referenced wallets did not belong to them. Shane Shin, a founding partner of Shorooq Partners and an investor in the Mantra Ecosystem Fund (MEF), received 2 million OM tokens from a previously dormant wallet hours before the crash. The OM collapse was attributed to "cross-exchange liquidations," with OKX and Binance addressing the issue directly. Binance suggested the crash resulted from such liquidations, while OKX Founder labeled it a "big scandal." Shorooq clarified they have not sold OM tokens and are focused on the project's long-term growth. Mantra's response to the collapse and its implications for the MEF were not available at the time of publication.
news.headline: Investors dumped Mantra's OM token before it crashed 90%- $227 million worth tokens moved; insider activity suspected.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on April 14, 2025, USANA Health Sciences, Inc., a prominent player in cellular nutrition worldwide, completed a clinical examination of its Celavive Resurfacing Serum to assess its effectiveness and tolerability. The findings indicated that the Resurfacing Serum performed exceptionally well in...
news.headline: USANA study finds Celavive Resurfacing Serum improves skin appearance in 2 weeks. Clinical trial confirms product efficacy.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global demand for electric vehicles (EVs) is on the rise, with sales reaching approximately 2.1 million in 2020. This represents a significant increase of 39% compared to the previous year. The surge in EV sales can be attributed to various factors, including government incentives, advancements in technology, and growing concerns about climate change. China led the global EV market with sales of around 1.25 million vehicles, followed by Europe with 590,000 vehicles. The data also shows that the United States saw a notable increase in EV sales, reaching approximately 330,000 vehicles in 2020. Experts predict that this trend will continue as more countries commit to phasing out internal combustion engine vehicles in the coming years.
news.headline: Tech analysts face uncertainty due to profit forecast volatility, creating risk as they adopt a wait-and-see approach.
$GS Goldman Sachs Q1 2025 Earnings

news.summary: A recent report on the air treatment systems market in Kazakhstan has been released, projecting significant growth by 2025. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate of over 5% during the forecast period. This expansion is attributed to various factors, including rising concerns about air pollution in urban areas, decreasing poverty rates, increasing residential real estate projects, and the growing prevalence of e-commerce.
news.headline: Kazakhstan's air treatment systems market is set to grow at over 5% CAGR to reach $28 million by 2025, driven by urban pollution concerns and e-commerce growth.

news.summary: A significant milestone was achieved by Systemair in Skinnskatteberg, Sweden on April 14, 2025. The company solidified its commitment to sustainability by having its emission targets officially sanctioned by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). This internationally acclaimed organization is dedicated to verifying that companies align their targets with the latest climate science. This move signifies Systemair's dedication to reducing its environmental impact and contributing to global efforts to combat climate change.
news.headline: Systemair in Sweden has emission targets approved by SBTi, a sustainability organization to reduce emissions significantly.

news.summary: IonQ, a notable player in quantum computing and networking, has recently disclosed a significant development. The company has inked a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Global Research and Development Center for Business by Quantum-AI Technology (G-QuAT), a sector of the esteemed National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology in Japan. The news marks a milestone in the respective industries, underscoring the importance of international partnerships in advancing quantum technologies.
news.headline: IonQ collaborates with AIST's G-QuAT in Japan, signing a MOU. AIST is Japan's largest research org. (110 char)

news.summary: Recognized by the Barbara Ann Karmanos Cancer Institute and nationwide organizations, April is acknowledged as Head and Neck Cancer Awareness Month. Various cancers affecting the head and neck region are highlighted, including ear and eye cancer among others. This initiative aims to raise awareness about these diseases and promote early detection and treatment. Taking place annually, the campaign educates individuals about the importance of managing risk factors and seeking medical attention promptly. By providing information and resources, efforts are made to reduce the impact of these cancers, which collectively account for a significant number of cases worldwide.
news.headline: Karmanos Cancer Institute raises awareness for Head and Neck Cancer during April; various types of cancers found are Ear and Eye cancer.

news.summary: Sectigo, a prominent player in digital certificates and automated Certificate Lifecycle Management, has revealed that the CA/Browser (CA/B) Forum ballot it supported to shorten the maximum validity period of SSL/TLS certificates to 47 days by 2029 has been successfully approved without any objections. This significant decision aims to bolster cybersecurity, promote automation in certificate handling, and prepare infrastructures for the advent of quantum computing.
news.headline: CA/Browser Forum approves reducing SSL/TLS certificates to 47 days by 2029 to boost security and automation.
